title: Nie's Higher Build Limit (512)
description: A Datapack and or Mod which increases the build limit from 320 to 512.
body: A Datapack and or Mod which increases the build limit from 320 to 512. This may not be compatibile with other mods or datapacks which also change the build limit, I am merely making this so others can use it; though I will also be using it for my own mods as dependencies.
